name: Suspicious Cobalt Strike DNS Beaconing - DNS Client
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Cobalt Strike DNS Beaconing - DNS Client
SIGMA Description: Detects a program that invoked suspicious DNS queries known from Cobalt Strike beacons

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3008 AND ((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%aaa.stage.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%post.1%') OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.stage.123456.%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Cobalt Strike DNS Beaconing - DNS Client on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3008 AND ((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%aaa.stage.%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%post.1%') OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.stage.123456.%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Cobalt Strike DNS Beaconing - DNS Client
